title: cineraria senecionis
intro: Cineraria senecionis, also known as Wollemi pine or Dinosaur tree, is a unique plant species native to Australia, characterized by its distinctive, feathery foliage and conical shape. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. These properties are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its health benefits in treating various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Cineraria senecionis can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture for medicinal use.
